dbRollbackRequirements.notes: Static site deployment (r2-static). No database schema changes occur during deployment. Rollback is purely a storage + URL redirect operation with zero DB impact.

storageRollbackRequirements.cleanupCommand: DELETE objects under r2://assets-stencil/deployments/19e9cfa9-cdff-4df0-83fa-dec0a8acba90/ (2 files, 8kb). Previous deployment remains live at its own prefix.

rollbackSteps.detail: No prior deployment exists. Restore from source: re-run the full pipeline from scrape → generate → deploy.
